keys.description: Compiled FileKindRegistry (kind_key -> {allowed_mimes, max_size, variants, retention, permissions}). Warmed on boot; long-lived.
Compiled map of variant_key -> Recipe class + config. Same lifecycle as kinds registry.

Current signing key (HMAC secret) used by SignedUrlIssuer. Rotated per config('storage.signing_key_rotation_days'). Rotation writes a new key + moves the previous under `storage:signing_key:previous` for the grace window.
Previous signing key retained during rotation grace (config('storage.signing_key_rotation_grace_days', 30)). Redemption middleware tries current first, previous second.
Cached SignedUrlAudit lookup by signature_hash — the redemption hot path. Reads happen per redemption; caching cuts the DB round-trip. Invalidated on revocation or expiration sweep.
Cached count + size of files per (tenant, kind). Feeds the storage dashboard + quota-approaching notifications.
Which storage disk (s3-us / s3-eu / gcs / azure) a tenant's uploads route to. Set at tenant provisioning + rarely changed. TTL long — tenants changing region is a major operation.
Cached refcount for a content-addressable blob. Reads on dedup-hit check; writes on File create + hard-delete via ContentAddressableStore.
Redemption rate-limit counter per client IP. Enforced by the storage-redemption throttle.
Currently-loaded AV signature database version (ClamAV freshclam updates advance this). Used by the storage:rescan-virus command to know which quarantined files may benefit from a rescan.
